ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airflow_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Airflow instance configuration */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL of the Airflow instance */,
  "username" TEXT /* The Airflow user performing the request */,
  "password" TEXT /* The password for the Airflow user */,
  "dag_id" TEXT /* The DAG to trigger */,
  "dag_conf" TEXT /* DAG run configuration that will be passed as is */,
  "env_var_support" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if environment variables are supported */,
  "environment" TEXT /* The environment (e.g., staging, production, development) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the instance is active */,
  "last_validated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last validation */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the last validation (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Airflow instance that was changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "is_rollback" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the change was a rollback */,
  "rollback_to" TEXT /* Timestamp to which the configuration was rolled back */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the change (e.g., pending, applied, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_history_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES airflow_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_variables" (
  "env_var_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment variable */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated Airflow instance */,
  "var_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment variable */,
  "var_value" TEXT /* Value of the environment variable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment variable was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the variable contains sensitive information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_var_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_variables_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES airflow_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dags" (
  "dag_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the DAG */,
  "dag_name" TEXT /* Name of the DAG */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DAG */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the DAG */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the DAG was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "last_run_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last run */,
  "last_run_status" TEXT /* Status of the last run (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_system_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is a system default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_system_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission is a system default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the association is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., config_change, user_login) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the event */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Airflow instance related to the event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the event was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the client performing the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES airflow_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the validation record */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Airflow instance being validated */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the configuration is valid */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message in case of invalid configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_validation_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES airflow_instances ("instance_id")
)
